attacking_style: Deployed in early, field-softening attacks on climbs before protected riders make their move. Classic domestique sacrifice pattern rather than personal victory attempts.
team_tactics: Used as expendable attacking domestique to elevate pace and deplete rivals before team leader's decisive move. Executes pre-planned softening attacks on key climbs.
terrain_preference: Climbs where sustained attacking effort can wear down the peloton, such as Green Mountain. Strength appears suited to prolonged tempo-raising rather than explosive finishes.
vulnerability: Single race data insufficient to identify clear weaknesses. Role as domestique suggests not trusted for final winning moves or flat sprint scenarios.
key_patterns: Sacrificial early attacks on climbs to soften field for protected riders (Tour of Oman)
Classic domestique role rather than protected status or personal ambitions (Tour of Oman)
form_trajectory: unknown: Only one race observation from 2017; insufficient data to assess trajectory or current form
